Response.Say: This is Nova 7 Mission Control with a resolution update.
The previously reported anomaly has been resolved. All affected subsystems have returned to nominal status. Telemetry streams are flowing normally and no further cascade effects have been detected.
The Elastic A.I. agent completed its investigation and the automated remediation workflow has restored the affected fault channel to standby.
No further action is required at this time. The mission countdown is clear to proceed.
End of resolution notice. Nova 7 Mission Control out.
